allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''instagram''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''youtube''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''twitter''\)\)\)")
